targets.rawSql: SELECT t.ts AS time, s.name AS metric, t.value_num AS value FROM telemetry t JOIN satellite s USING (norad) WHERE t.field = 'battery_v' ORDER BY t.ts

panels.title: Frames received per hour, by satellite

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', t.ts) AS time, s.name AS metric, count(DISTINCT t.ts)::float AS value FROM telemetry t JOIN satellite s USING (norad) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Link status — last frame, coverage, battery

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.name AS satellite, s.norad, max(t.ts) AS last_frame, round(extract(epoch FROM now() - max(t.ts)) / 3600, 1) AS hours_silent, count(DISTINCT t.ts) AS frames_7d, round(avg(t.value_num) FILTER (WHERE t.field = 'battery_v')::numeric, 2) AS avg_battery_v, round(avg(t.value_num) FILTER (WHERE t.field = 'battery_pct')::numeric, 0) AS avg_battery_pct FROM satellite s LEFT JOIN telemetry t USING (norad) GROUP BY s.name, s.norad ORDER BY max(t.ts) DESC NULLS LAST
